items.name_en: [Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock
items.name_cn:
[Best Seller Large] 🆕 In Stock
 Neo Cagole New Motorcycle Bag 💋
Parisian brand's new motorcycle bag, reshaping the classic silhouette and infusing new soul into the 'motorcycle bag'. Crafted from top-tier imported Italian bursting sheepskin, it retains the original DNA of classic motorcycle bags with flat rivets, exquisite buckles, and fringe zippers. It adds adjustable woven shoulder straps and a cute playful heart-shaped mirror, perfectly softening the original unisex temperament. 🧐 Vintage revival, a favorite among fashionistas. 👄 Size: 38*17*24cm

items.name_en: [Blue D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Strap ❤ Large]
items.name_cn:
[Blue D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Strap ❤ Large]
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
This Book Tote handbag is inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily items, featuring a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes pattern embroidery, making it more stylish. The front is decorated with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Dimensions: 42×35×18.5cm
